venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menus of contemporary and classic dishes; complimentary caviar available on request at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant aft. Buffet with live cooking stations for breakfast and lunch; regionally themed à la carte dinner service each evening. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio
venues.description: Open-air poolside venue serving casual lunch — salads, burgers, grilled seafood, and light bites. Complimentary.

venues.name: Earth & Ocean at The Patio
venues.description: The Patio transforms each evening into a candlelit à la carte dinner restaurant. Eclectic world flavors by consulting Chef Anton Egger celebrating global ingredients in an open-air setting. Reservations recommended. Complimentary.

venues.name: Solis
venues.description: Seabourn's signature specialty restaurant, opened on Encore in Spring 2024 (replacing The Grill by Thomas Keller). Mediterranean-inspired cuisine by Master Chef Anton Egger — light, colorful, handcrafted dishes with fresh seasonal ingredients. Dinner only; reservations required (one booking per guest per 7-day voyage). Complimentary.

venues.name: Sushi
venues.description: Dedicated sushi restaurant — a unique feature of the Encore-class ships not found as a standalone venue on the Odyssey-class fleet. Fresh sashimi, nigiri, maki rolls, and small plates. Evening hours. Complimentary.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub on Deck 7 — freshly roasted specialty coffees, handmade gelato, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu served course-by-course during dinner hours; dedicated menus for breakfast, lunch, and snacks throughout the day.
